examples: He's always bragging about his prowess as a hunter.
In all deeds of prowess as well as in large schemes of war Richard shone.
Mr Obama's fundraising prowess gives him momentum.
But even Federer, whose serve-and-volley prowess helped secure six Wimbledon titles, has abandoned the technique.
Unsurprisingly, Google has tapped its prowess in Web search for a section called Sparks.
